completedPhaseClaims.summary: Scope 1 (cache-owned MSFT market truth) finalized under consolidated ownership on a clean committed tree (baseline HEAD 2577a36). Implementation is committed: validators msftValidateQuoteEnvelope/msftValidateBarsEnvelope, daily-only derivation msftDeriveDailyTechnicals, immutable msftBuildAcceptedState, and the MsftJulyModel cache-first null-safe boot. All twelve Feature 009 Scope 1 selftest assertions pass; node scripts/selftest.mjs = 645 passed/0 failed exit 0 (TP-009-S1-01); the browser regression tests/msft-july-market-refresh.spec.mjs (TP-009-S1-02) passes with zero provider requests. Containment verified against the current committed baseline: no page-local credential resurrection, Bond Regime and MSFT registry records intact (3x each), marker-bounded Feature 009 selftest group, no shared/data/brief regression. Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

Scope 2 (isolated degraded market states) implemented additively in msft-july-print-model.html: monotonic acceptance msftShouldAcceptQuote/msftShouldAcceptBars, top-level msftAggregateMarketStatus (the boot IIFE now delegates to it), the closed msftSafeReasonCopy display map, the msftReduceResourceOutcome per-resource reducer, and the public window.MsftJulyModel.applyResourceOutcome production operation. TP-009-S2-01 red (function not found: msftAggregateMarketStatus) then green: node scripts/selftest.mjs = 650 passed/0 failed exit 0 with five new Feature 009 Scope 2 assertions. TP-009-S2-02 red (applyResourceOutcome absent) then green: the focused browser regression drives quote-missing bars-only truth, bars-missing quote-only truth, and stale-quote-plus-malformed-bars isolation with zero provider requests and no request interception; the full msft spec (2 tests) stays green so Scope 1 did not regress. Containment: only the four allowed surfaces changed, no page-local credential, no 390.49 spot, model cutoff 2026-07-06 intact, Feature 009 selftest edits strictly inside the markers, excluded surfaces untouched. Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

Scope 3 (market/model interaction integrity) implemented additively in msft-july-print-model.html: the pure top-level msftBuildValuationRead(model, quote, probabilities, impliedMovePct) spot-relative valuation read with finite-positive guards and closed reason codes (quote-required, positive-modeled-eps-required, positive-implied-price-required, probability-weights-required, non-negative-implied-move-required; never 0/NaN/Infinity), a refresh-failed branch in msftReduceResourceOutcome for quote and bars that records the failure receipt while preserving the last accepted value/clocks/rows, the public window.MsftJulyModel.applyRefreshOutcome production refresh operation (requestSeq-stamped monotonic acceptance plus spot repricing on genuine accept), the read-only readValuation/snapshotScenarioInputs diagnostics, the #o_pricevs rendering wired through msftBuildValuationRead, and removal of the autoImpliedMove write into the user-owned impMove input (options IV evidence retained). TP-009-S3-01 red (function not found: msftBuildValuationRead) then green: node scripts/selftest.mjs = 658 passed/0 failed exit 0 with eight new Feature 009 Scope 3 assertions. TP-009-S3-02 red (applyRefreshOutcome/readValuation/snapshotScenarioInputs absent) then green: the focused browser regression edits the real Q4-revenue/depreciation/selected-P/E/implied-move controls, drives an accepted newer spot (reprices spotOverEps 24.21->24.93 and #o_pricevs $394->$406 while modeledEps and the selected P/E 26 stay unchanged), an older out-of-order candidate (newer seq 2 retained), and a failed refresh (accepted value+clocks preserved, MSFT-QUOTE-HTTP recorded), with the seeded options snapshot proving impMove stays 5.5 (autoImpliedMove write removed) and the IV evidence retained; zero provider requests, no interception; the full msft spec (3 tests) stays green so Scopes 1 and 2 did not regress. Containment: only the four allowed surfaces changed, no 390.49 spot, model cutoff 2026-07-06 intact (5 occurrences), only centralized RLDATA transport, Feature 009 selftest edits strictly inside the markers (BEGIN 1830 / END 2261). Certification pending bubbles.audit + bubbles.validate; certification.* and feature status unchanged.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Analyst bootstrap initialized during an orchestrated full-delivery goal run. Execution history is reserved for the parent orchestrator; status, completed claims, scope progress, and certification remain at baseline.
